subcodes.first_line: O ye who stand firm in the Covenant of that household! Praise be to God, they abide beneath the shelter of the All-Merciful... As to the mystery of "reversing the symbol of authority," reversal hath two meanings: one signifieth return, and the other, overthrow [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابتان بر پیمان آن خاندان الحمد لله در ظل حضرت رحمانند... اما مسئله سرّ التّنکيس لرمز الرّئيس تنکيس دو معنی دارد يکی به معنی عود است و ديگری به معنی سرنگونی
subcodes.subjects: @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @spiritual transformation, @firmness in the Covenant, @light and darkness, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
